articles.title: Meta informs staff of layoffs affecting 8,000 employees amid AI push - Fox Business
articles.description: As AI spending booms, Meta announces 8,000 layoffs while Microsoft offers voluntary retirement to thousands of employees amid tech reductions.
articles.content:
Meta has informed its staff it will let go of roughly 8,000 employees — approximately 10% of its workforce — as it looks to bolster its presence in the artificial intelligence space.
